queries.question: List the movies in descending order of their running time and extended version lengths.
queries.sql: SELECT Movies.Title FROM Movies ORDER BY Movies.Running_Time, Extended_Version_Length DESC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:Title ?title .
  ?movies p:Running_Time ?running_time_o .
  ?movies p:Extended_Version_Length ?extended_version_length_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?running_time_o) DESC(?extended_version_length_o)

queries.question: Who directed the movie with the longest time of its extended version?
queries.sql: SELECT Directors.Name FROM Movies INNER JOIN Directors ON Movies.DirectorID = Directors.DirectorID ORDER BY Movies.Extended_Version_Length DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?directors a :Directors .
  ?movies p:hasDirectors ?directors .
  ?directors p:name ?name .
  ?movies p:Extended_Version_Length ?extended_version_length_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?extended_version_length_o)
LIMIT 1
